details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest technology stock under $40 with volume > 1M
Task 2: Create diversified large-cap watchlist from screener results
Task 3: Set 5% price-drop alert on largest stock holding
Task 4: Invest $2,000 in qualifying bond ETF with best 5-year return
Task 5: Set $150 monthly recurring investment into S&P 500 index fund
Task 6: Sell part of largest stock holding to raise approx $600
Task 7: Compare two ETFs and watchlist cheaper one with AUM > $500M
Task 8: Move $1,000 from brokerage cash to highest-yield savings over 3%
Task 9: Place GTC limit buy 5% below current price for most traded stock
